page_content:
GEMS - Gemstone

GEMS100 Freshman Honors Colloquium: Introduction to Gemstone (1 Credit)

Orienting new Gemstone students to the university and to the program through a variety of team building activities, resources, and skill exploration exercises. Students will also examine and discuss areas such as liberal education, diversity, service, arts, current events, academic integrity, and leadership style.

Restriction: Must be in the Gemstone program.

2025-2026 [updated 2025.04.17]
